construction.panels: Standard baseball jersey construction with set-in sleeves. Features a full-button front placket and a V-neck collar.
construction.seams: Standard flat seams throughout. White piping runs along the V-neck collar, down the front placket, and around the sleeve cuffs, creating distinct visual lines.
construction.closures: Seven white plastic buttons on the front placket for full closure.
construction.details: V-neck collar. Short sleeves with double white stripe cuffs. Straight hemline. No visible pockets.

graphics.size: approximately 18 inches wide, 4.5 inches tall at center

graphics.content: SkyyRose logo and text (stylized 'S' or rose)
BLACK ROSE COLLECTION with baseball-style logo (similar to MLB logo)

branding.primary_logo: Stylized 'S' or rose graphic with 'SkyyRose' text
branding.secondary_marks: Woven label on lower front right hem featuring 'BLACK ROSE COLLECTION' text and a baseball-style logo.

fabric_appearance: Smooth jersey knit with a slight sheen, characteristic of athletic polyester fabric.
unique_features: The prominent 'BLACK IS BEAUTIFUL' graphic on the front. Part of the 'BLACK is Beautiful Jersey Series: 4. THE ROSE (SHARKS EDITION)' as indicated by product context and the 'BLACK ROSE COLLECTION' woven label.
collection_aesthetic: This piece embodies Oakland luxury streetwear, blending 'dark luxury' with 'Oakland grit' through its bold statement and athletic silhouette, expressing 'emotional expression' via the 'BLACK IS BEAUTIFUL' message.
